message.butdaysblueprint.already_read: You have already read this blueprint
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/unknown.descr: A debug tool that wipes all learned blueprint knowledge
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/unknown.toolt: Your mind goes blank... all blueprint knowledge has been erased
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/unknown.messa: Creative only. Not meant for mortal hands.
gui.help.detail: §7Click arrows to flip to next recipe
butdaysblueprint.title: Blueprint Anthology
butdaysblueprint.author: §othe arbiter
butdaysblueprint.intro:
I know that I hung on a windy tree nine whole nights, wounded with a spear, given to Odin — myself to myself, on that tree whose roots no man knows. No bread did they give me, nor drink from a horn. I took up the runes, screaming I took them, and fell back from there.

One word sought another word for me, one deed sought another deed for me.
— Hávamál
butdaysblueprint.advancements.root.title: Hidden Gaze
butdaysblueprint.advancements.root.descr: Start the journey to find the fragments of wisdom
All wisdom is yours. The long winter begins — and you walk into it, knowing.
In your dreams, you heard the whispers of knowledge
butdaysblueprint.advancements.dream_agai: Sleeping with a book, the prophet once again entrusted wisdom to you
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/nasa_workbenc: They all say radiation rockets are trendy, but I'm a traditionalist
You figured out how it works
Maybe the meteorites that fell from the sky know something
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/drawing_abili: Pain will pass, beauty will remain
It's like wearing glasses, you see more
Farewell, Rose! Jack and his painting secrets sank beneath the waves...
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/music_produce: Actually we don't have to resort to violence
You learned the singing skills of mermaids
Go ask the mermaids for it, if they don't give it, beat them until they do
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/contaminated_: Evil is fermenting in your mind
Dungeons and woodland mansions always have creepy stuff like this. It's in the script.
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/engineer_manu: An advanced version of the engineer manuscript
Ahh I'm going to grow a brain
Just apply the ability to chop trees with bare hands to crafting
Toolsmiths always leave their blueprints lying around
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/bioprogram.to: Cloning a tyrannosaurus is no longer difficult
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/bioprogram.me: Fun fact: dinosaurs were bred by the Maya. Don't believe me? Check the jungle temple.
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/honey_yellowp: This blueprint is from a Michelin five-star dessert chef
You gained the wisdom of this blueprint by chewing
Just drip honey on the blueprint, it's that simple
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/key_to_city.t: You have entered the modern journey
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/key_to_city.m: Defend the pig town! ...or just loot the church chest
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/residual_chap: Prosperity existed in the past, but now only silence answers
Elder Guardians collect these by fishing. True story.
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/imperial_edic: The king of the distant past is now only a shadow of him
No acquisition method or recipe defined yet
Small animals are more willing to get close to you
No acquisition method or recipe defined yet
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/fading_in_the: Please give me your heart, join me
You carried my soul out of its prison
Defeat the Wither and pick this dark gift from its ashes
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/wormholes_on_: Cannot be used to go back in time
Ever wonder why the Ender Dragon can open a portal to send you home?
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/the_sands_of_: Turns to flowing sand, slipping through your fingers
Buried beneath the desert pyramid's golden sand, time stands still
An unquenchable flame frozen in a moment
Turns to ash the instant your fingertips touch it
Blazes and Bastion Remnants hide a flame that never dies
butdaysblueprint.blueprint/contaminated_: There is no holy light, only... power!
Forbidden knowledge screams in your mind... your sanity crumbles
